calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion to compel responses to post-judgment discovery; and for award of monetary sanctions granted as follows:
1. All objections to the specified discovery are waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
a. Within ten days of the date of service of this order, defendants Civic Center Restaurant, Rick Davis each shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's post-judgment request for production of documents and form interrogatories;
2. Request for an award of monetary sanctions is granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, jointly and severally against defendants Civic Center Restaurant, Rick Davis, and payable within thirty days of the date of service of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion for appointment of receiver, and to appoint Richard B. Cole as receiver is granted. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
